```{r figure 19, fig.height=3.5, out.width="100%", echo=FALSE}
    filter(all(c(2008, 2023) %in% Year)) %>%
    summarise(
        debut = Assets[Year == 2008],
        fin = Assets[Year == 2023],
        croissance_pct = (fin - debut) / debut * 100
    ) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = croissance_pct, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    arrange(desc(croissance_pct)) %>%
    ungroup()

p19 <- ggplot(croissance_actifs_industrie,
             aes(x = fct_reorder(str_wrap(Industry_clean, width = 30), croissance_pct),
                 y = croissance_pct,
                 fill = Industry_clean)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = " ")) +
    labs(
        x = "Industrie",
        y = "Taux de croissance (%)"
        ) +
    theme_univ +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0),
          legend.position = "none")

p19
```

###### **Évolution temporelle des actifs** {.unnumbered}

**Figure 20 - Évolution des actifs des 10 industries entre 2008 et 2023**

```{r figure 20, fig.height=5, out.width="90%", echo=FALSE}
croissance_actifs_industrie <- data_all %>%
    group_by(Industry_clean, Year) %>%
    summarise(Actifs = sum(Assets, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Industry_clean) %>%
    summarise(
        debut = Actifs[Year == min(Year)],
        fin = Actifs[Year == max(Year)],
        croissance_pct = (fin - debut) / debut * 100
    ) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = croissance_pct, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    arrange(desc(croissance_pct)) %>%
    ungroup()

top10_industries_actifs <- croissance_actifs_industrie$Industry_clean

data_plot <- data_all %>%
  filter(Industry_clean %in% top10_industries_actifs) %>%
  group_by(Industry_clean, Year) %>%
  summarise(Actifs = sum(Assets, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

data_plot$Industry_wrap <- str_wrap(data_plot$Industry_clean, width = 20)

p20 <- plot_ly(data = data_plot,
               x = ~Year,
               y = ~Actifs,
               color = ~Industry_wrap,
               colors = viridis(10, option = "viridis"),
               type = "scatter",
               mode = "lines+markers",
               text = ~paste(
                   "Industrie :", Industry_clean,
                   "<br>Année :", Year,
                   "<br>Actifs totaux :",
                   scales::comma(Actifs, big.mark = " ")
                   ),
               hoverinfo = "text"
               ) %>% 
    layout(
        xaxis = list(title = "<b>Année</b>",
                     showgrid = FALSE,
                     showline = TRUE),
        yaxis = list(title = "<b>Actifs totaux (en millions USD)</b>",
                     showgrid = FALSE,
                     showline = TRUE),
        legend = list(title = list(text = "<b>Industries</b>")),
        width = 900,
        height = 500
        ) 

p20
```

<br>

### Annexe C {#annexeC .unnumbered}

Variable `Profits`

**Figure 21 - Pays ayant les profits totaux les plus élevés de 2008 à 2023**

```{r figure 21, fig.height=3, out.width="100%", echo=FALSE}
top10_ctry <- data_all %>%
    group_by(Year, Country_clean) %>%
    summarise(total_profits = sum(Profits, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Year) %>%
    slice_max(total_profits, n = 10) %>%
    arrange(Year, desc(total_profits)) %>%
    ungroup()

p21 <- ggplot(top10_ctry,
             aes(x = fct_reorder(Country_clean, total_profits),
                 y = total_profits,
                 fill = Country_clean)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = " ")) +
    labs(
        title = "Profits totaux en {closest_state}",
        x = "Pays",
        y = "Profits totaux (en millions USD)"
        ) +
    theme_univ +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0),
          legend.position = "none")

anim <- p21 +
    transition_states(Year, transition_length = 4, state_length = 2) +
    ease_aes("cubic-in-out")

animate(anim, nframes = 200, fps = 10)
```

<br>

Variable `Assets`

**Figure 22 - Pays ayant les actifs totaux les plus élevés de 2008 à 2023**

```{r figure 22, fig.height=3, out.width="100%", echo=FALSE}
top10_ctry <- data_all %>%
    group_by(Year, Country_clean) %>%
    summarise(total_assets = sum(Assets, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Year) %>%
    slice_max(total_assets, n = 10) %>%
    arrange(Year, desc(total_assets)) %>%
    ungroup()

p22 <- ggplot(top10_ctry,
             aes(x = fct_reorder(Country_clean, total_assets),
                 y = total_assets,
                 fill = Country_clean)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = " ")) +
    labs(
        title = "Actifs totaux en {closest_state}",
        x = "Pays",
        y = "Actifs totaux (en millions USD)"
        ) +
    theme_univ +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0),
          legend.position = "none")

anim <- p22 +
  transition_states(Year, transition_length = 4, state_length = 2) +
  ease_aes("cubic-in-out")

animate(anim, nframes = 200, fps = 10)
```

<br>

Variable `Market_Value`

**Figure 23 - Pays ayant la valeur marchande la plus élevée de 2008 à 2023**

```{r figure 23, fig.height=3, out.width="100%", echo=FALSE}
top10_ctry <- data_all %>%
    group_by(Year, Country_clean) %>%
    summarise(total_mValue = sum(Market_Value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Year) %>%
    slice_max(total_mValue, n = 10) %>%
    arrange(Year, desc(total_mValue)) %>%
    ungroup()

p23 <- ggplot(top10_ctry,
             aes(x = fct_reorder(Country_clean, total_mValue),
                 y = total_mValue,
                 fill = Country_clean)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = " ")) +
    labs(
        title = "Valeur marchande en {closest_state}",
        x = "Pays",
        y = "Valeur marchande (en millions USD)"
        ) +
    theme_univ +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0),
          legend.position = "none")

anim <- p23 +
  transition_states(Year, transition_length = 4, state_length = 2) +
  ease_aes("cubic-in-out")

animate(anim, nframes = 200, fps = 10)
```

### Annexe D {#annexeD .unnumbered}

##### Variable `Profits` {.tabset .unnumbered}

###### **Croissance des profits** {.unnumbered}

**Figure 24 - Taux de croissance des profits par pays entre 2008 et 2023**

```{r figure 24, fig.height = 3.5, out.width="90%", echo=FALSE}
croissance_profits_pays <- data_all %>%
    group_by(Country_clean, Year) %>%
    summarise(Profits = sum(Profits, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Country_clean) %>%
    filter(all(c(2008, 2023) %in% Year)) %>%
    summarise(
        debut = Profits[Year == 2008],
        fin = Profits[Year == 2023],
        croissance_pct = (fin - debut) / debut * 100
    ) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = croissance_pct, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    arrange(desc(croissance_pct)) %>%
    ungroup()

p24 <- ggplot(croissance_profits_pays,
            aes(x = fct_reorder(Country_clean, croissance_pct),
                y = croissance_pct,
                fill = Country_clean)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = " ")) +
    labs(
        x = "Pays",
        y = "Taux de croissance (%)"
    ) +
    theme_univ +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0),
          legend.position = "none")

p24
```

###### **Évolution temporelle des profits** {.unnumbered}

**Figure 25 - Évolution des profits des 10 pays entre 2008 et 2023**

```{r figure 25, fig.height=3.5, out.width="90%", echo=FALSE}
top10_pays_profits <- croissance_profits_pays$Country_clean

data_plot <- data_all %>%
  filter(Country_clean %in% top10_pays_profits) %>%
  group_by(Country_clean, Year) %>%
  summarise(Profits = sum(Profits, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p25 <- plot_ly(data = data_plot,
               x = ~Year,
               y = ~Profits,
               color = ~Country_clean,
               colors = viridis(10, option = "viridis"),
               type = "scatter",
               mode = "lines+markers",
               text = ~paste(
                   "Pays :", Country_clean,
                   "<br>Année :", Year,
                   "<br>Profits totaux :",
                   scales::comma(Profits, big.mark = " ")
                   ),
               hoverinfo = "text"
               ) %>% 
    layout(
        xaxis = list(title = "<b>Année</b>",
                     showgrid = FALSE,
                     showline = TRUE),
        yaxis = list(title = "<b>Profits totaux (en millions USD)</b>",
                     showgrid = FALSE,
                     showline = TRUE),
        legend = list(title = list(text = "<b>Pays</b>")),
        width = 900,
        height = 400
        ) 

p25
```

<br>

##### Variable `Assets` {.tabset .unnumbered}

###### **Croissance des actifs** {.unnumbered}

**Figure 26 - Taux de croissance des actifs par pays entre 2008 et 2023**

```{r figure 26, fig.height = 3.5, out.width="90%", echo=FALSE}
croissance_assets_pays <- data_all %>%
    group_by(Country_clean, Year) %>%
    summarise(Assets = sum(Assets, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Country_clean) %>%
    filter(all(c(2008, 2023) %in% Year)) %>%
    summarise(
        debut = Assets[Year == 2008],
        fin = Assets[Year == 2023],
        croissance_pct = (fin - debut) / debut * 100
    ) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = croissance_pct, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    arrange(desc(croissance_pct)) %>%
    ungroup()

p26 <- ggplot(croissance_assets_pays,
            aes(x = fct_reorder(Country_clean, croissance_pct),
                y = croissance_pct,
                fill = Country_clean)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = " ")) +
    labs(
        x = "Pays",
        y = "Taux de croissance (%)"
    ) +
    theme_univ +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0),
          legend.position = "none")

p26
```

###### **Évolution temporelle des actifs** {.unnumbered}

**Figure 27 - Évolution des actifs des 10 pays entre 2008 et 2023**

```{r figure 27, fig.height=3.5, out.width="90%", echo=FALSE}
top10_pays_assets <- croissance_assets_pays$Country_clean

data_plot <- data_all %>%
  filter(Country_clean %in% top10_pays_assets) %>%
  group_by(Country_clean, Year) %>%
  summarise(Assets = sum(Assets, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p27 <- plot_ly(data = data_plot,
               x = ~Year,
               y = ~Assets,
               color = ~Country_clean,
               colors = viridis(10, option = "viridis"),
               type = "scatter",
               mode = "lines+markers",
               text = ~paste(
                   "Pays :", Country_clean,
                   "<br>Année :", Year,
                   "<br>Actifs totaux :",
                   scales::comma(Assets, big.mark = " ")
                   ),
               hoverinfo = "text"
               ) %>% 
    layout(
        xaxis = list(title = "<b>Année</b>",
                     showgrid = FALSE,
                     showline = TRUE),
        yaxis = list(title = "<b>Actifs totaux (en millions USD)</b>",
                     showgrid = FALSE,
                     showline = TRUE),
        legend = list(title = list(text = "<b>Pays</b>")),
        width = 900,
        height = 400
        ) 

p27
```

## Références

Ritika01mp. (2023). *Forbes Global 2000 2008–2023 (mil. unit)* [jeu de données]. Kaggle. https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/ritika01mp/forbes-global-2000-2008-2023-mil-unit
